backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for a book platform, including types and logic for books, users, reading progress, bookmarks, and admin operations with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (admin dashboard, analytics, user management, book management, etc.) to their corresponding frontend source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar) for both light and dark themes using OKLCH-style values.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Prodigy SPA, setting the page title, favicon links, and mounting the React app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines and registers all TanStack Router routes (Home, Genres, Browse, BookDetail, Reader, Upload, Dashboard, Admin, AuthorProfile, About) under a root layout route and exports the RouterProvider-wrapped App component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Sidebar navigation for the admin dashboard with Overview, Users, Books, and Security sections, highlighting the active section and showing a system-online status indicator.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookManage: Admin React component for managing books with search, filter, pagination, and mutations for approving, rejecting, deleting, featuring, and editing books via the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/admin/OverviewSe: Admin dashboard overview component that displays platform stats (users, books, approvals) and lists most-viewed and most-popular books using React Query.
frontend/src/components/admin/SecuritySe: Admin security panel that allows restricting a user's access by downgrading their role to guest via principal ID input, and displays pending books count.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin user management component with search and pagination UI; currently returns an empty user list due to a noted missing getAllUsers backend endpoint, and supports banning users by restricting their role.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that blocks access to admin pages by verifying the caller is authenticated via Internet Identity and confirmed as an admin via the backend `isCallerAdmin` query, showing appropriate login/denied UI otherwise.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Route guard component that shows a login prompt with a Browse Books fallback link when the user is not authenticated, and renders children once identity is confirmed.
frontend/src/components/BookCard.tsx: Renders a clickable book card with cover image, title, author, genre badge, and view count, linking to the book detail page. Handles missing covers with a fallback icon and optionally displays approval status.
frontend/src/components/CelestialDivider: A decorative horizontal divider component with gradient lines and gold star symbols on either side.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedBooks.ts: Displays a grid of up to 6 most recently uploaded approved books with loading skeletons and a link to browse all books.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, navigation links, genre quick-links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/GenreCard.tsx: Renders a styled genre card with a background texture, icon, name, and description that links to the browse page filtered by that genre.
Renders a horizontal row of pill-shaped genre filter links with icons for quick navigation to the browse page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Animated hero section with a canvas-based starfield/swirl background, the Prodigy logo, and CTA buttons for browsing or uploading books.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Navbar, Footer, loading screen, profile setup modal, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen splash/loading overlay displaying the Prodigy logo with a pulsing animation that auto-dismisses after 2 seconds.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, showing a spinner during the login process and clearing the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, dynamic links (including auth-gated Upload/Dashboard and admin-only Admin), theme toggle, login button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/PDFViewer.tsx: Canvas-based PDF viewer that lazy-loads PDF.js from CDN, supports page navigation, zoom controls, and cancels in-flight render tasks when switching pages.
frontend/src/components/PendingBooksQueu: Displays a list of pending books for admin review, providing Approve and Reject action buttons that call the respective mutation hooks and show toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter a display name, then calls registerUser and saveCallerUserProfile mutations to complete onboarding.
frontend/src/components/StatsCards.tsx: Renders a 2×2 / 4-column grid of stat cards showing total users, total books, approved books, and pending books from AdminStats data.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports constants for the Prodigy Digital Library brand asset paths (full logo and favicon icon).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing admin access control when an admin token is present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating data via the backend actor, covering user profiles, admin checks, books (by ID, genre, author), reading progress, and bookmarks.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and syncs it with the document root class.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark and admin themes, and styles the scrollbar.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger, date formatter, string truncator, and static genre lists with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page describing Prodigy's mission, values, and decentralized architecture with a hero section and a grid of value cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page protected by AdminGuard, featuring a responsive sidebar and switchable sections for overview, users, books, and security.
frontend/src/pages/AuthorProfile.tsx: Author profile page that fetches and displays a user's info and their published books, with loading skeletons and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/pages/BookDetail.tsx: Displays detailed information for a single book by ID, including cover, metadata, and description, with bookmark toggle and view increment on load.
frontend/src/pages/Browse.tsx: Browse page that lists all approved books with client-side filtering by search term and genre, using URL search params for initial genre selection.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard showing profile editing, uploaded books with approval status, bookmarks, and reading progress with continue-reading links.
frontend/src/pages/Genres.tsx: Static genres overview page rendering a grid of GenreCard components for each genre defined in the shared GENRES constant.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page composing HeroSection, GenreQuickLinks, FeaturedBooks, and a CTA section that adapts its messaging and actions based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/Reader.tsx: PDF reader page that loads a book by ID, restores the last-read page from saved progress, and debounce-saves page changes via PDFViewer callbacks.
frontend/src/pages/Upload.tsx: React page component for uploading and editing books, supporting both create and edit modes with form validation, client-side image compression via Canvas API, and a 4MB combined file size limit before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cinzel, Inter), OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, admin-specific color variables, border radius tokens, and fade/glow keyframe animations, plus typography, animate, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for the Prodigy Digital Library ICP platform, documenting schema version, architectural notes, known build issues, and a registry of existing and planned features with their requirement IDs and implementation status.
